subject: A massive moss-and-leaf-maned lion stands proudly in a forest glade
description: A huge regal lion-like cat with a thick mane composed of moss and leaves stands forward, body squared, gaze direct. Behind it is a deep forest in layered greens and shadow. Mood is regal, ancient, lore-keeper. Flavor text from Chulane, Teller of Tales: 'Only the lion knows more stories than I do.' Strong cat card and strong lore-keeper card at once.
foreground: Massive moss-maned lion standing proudly in forest light
background: Deep layered forest greens and dim shadow
